scenes.text:
Making more money does not make
you rich. Keeping more money does.

Most people get a raise and immediately upgrade their lifestyle. Bigger apartment. Nicer car. More subscriptions. This is called lifestyle inflation and it is
why people earning six figures still live paycheck to paycheck. The more you make, the more you spend, and you never actually get ahead.

When you get a raise, keep living like you did before. Bank the difference. Invest the difference. Let your
income grow while your expenses stay flat. That gap between income and spending is where wealth is built.

Rich is not how much you earn.
It is how much you keep.

Have you fallen into lifestyle inflation? Be
honest. Follow for smart money moves.
